Table.name: FR_VL_DCRS_CNTNGNT_ENCMBRNC
Table.commentInRDBMS: Contingent encumbrance refers to the additional assets which may need to be encumbered when the reporting institutions faces adverse developments triggered by an external event over which the reporting institution has no control (including a downgrade, decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets or a general loss of confidence). In these cases, the reporting institution will need to encumber additional assets as a consequence of already existing transactions. The additional amount of encumbered assets shall be net of the impact of the institution’s hedge transactions against the events described under the aforementioned stressed scenarios. (Annext 17 (Asset Encumbrance) 4. Part C)

Column.name: DT_RFRNC
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: ACCNTNG_CNSLDTN_LVL
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: CLLTRLSD_DPSTS_OTHR_RPRCHS_AGRMNTS_CNTRL_BNKS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Collateralised deposits other than repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_CVRD_BNDS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued as covered bonds additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as covered bonds by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: DBT_SCRTY_ISSD_SCRTSTNS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Debt securities issued as securitisations additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Debt securities issued as securitisations by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: DPSTS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Deposits additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are deposits by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: DRVTVS_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: OTC_DRVTV_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Over-The-Counter (OTC) derivatives by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: OTHR_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Other sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Other sources of encumbrance by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: RPRCHS_AGRMNT_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Repurchase agreements additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are repurchase agreements by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: RPRCHS_AGRMNT_CNTRL_BNK_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Repurchase agreements with central banks additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets that are Repurchase agreements with central banks by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: SLCTD_FNNCL_LBLT_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Selected financial liabilities additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the selected financial liabilities encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.

Column.name: TTL_SRCS_ENCMBRNC_ADDTNL_ENCMBRD_CRRYNG_AMNT
Column.comment: Total sources of encumbrance additional encumbered carrying amount in scenario A simulates the situation in which there is a decrease of the fair value of the encumbered assets by 30%. This fair value reduction could cause some of the liabilities that are the source of encumbrance to require for more protection and therefore for new assets to be encumbered. In template F 34.00.b the institution needs to report the amount of this additional encumbered assets in the eventuality of scenario A.
